definitions: 复杂精细的；错综复杂的

examples.text: Pritchett and his crew created intricate, color-coded maps marked with the GPS coordinates
examples.explanation: 普里切特和他的船员们制作了带有 GPS 坐标标记的、色彩编码的、错综复杂的地图。

examples.text: We build intricate habitats, devise complex recipes for our food, wear clothes that reflect constant changes in fashion,
examples.explanation: 我们建造复杂的栖息环境，为我们的食物设计复杂的食谱，穿着反映时尚不断变化的服装。
